name: meep-photonic-devices-refined-v1
description: Refined photonic-device benchmark with tighter search spaces, asymmetric block offsets, and longer budgets for more serious MEEP screening.
paper_hypothesis: Narrowing the search around empirically better regions and allowing asymmetric scatterers improves the quality of autonomous block-based photonic device optimization.

baseline_notes: This refined suite starts from the first-pass benchmark and narrows around lower-reflection regions.
The splitter and demux tasks add block-center offsets to break the strict vertical symmetry of the original geometry family.
These remain compact block-parameter studies, not adjoint topology optimization.
